LanguageData.DomSuccubusTail_Vaginal_RP.rulePack.rule: sent-> [INITIATOR_nameDef] [INITIATOR_possessive] 的尾巴塞进了 [RECIPIENT_nameDef]的阴道.
LanguageData.DomSuccubusTail_Anal_RP.rulePack.rulesSt: sent-> [INITIATOR_nameDef] [INITIATOR_possessive] 的尾巴塞进了 [RECIPIENT_nameDef]的肛门.
LanguageData.DomSuccubusTail_Envelop_RP.rulePack.rule: sent-> [RECIPIENT_nameDef] 的阴茎被 [INITIATOR_nameDef] [INITIATOR_possessive]的尾巴包裹住了。
LanguageData.SubSuccubusTail_Vaginal_RP.rulePack.rule: sent-> [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [RECIPIENT_possessive] 的尾巴被塞进了[INITIATOR_nameDef]的阴道.
LanguageData.SubSuccubusTail_Anal_RP.rulePack.rulesSt: sent-> [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [RECIPIENT_possessive] 的尾巴被塞进了 [INITIATOR_nameDef]的肛门.
LanguageData.SubSuccubusTail_Envelop_RP.rulePack.rule: sent-> [INITIATOR_nameDef] 用 [RECIPIENT_nameDef] [RECIPIENT_possessive] 的尾巴包裹住自己的阴茎。
